title: Wands and Spells
description: This mod adds a wand and spells from Harry Potter.
body:
This mod adds wands and spells from Harry Potter. Craft a wand in a crafting table with a stick in the middle, a feather in the bottom-left corner and a nether star in the top-right corner. Right-click the wand to open a GUI to cast spells. Type the spell in the box (all lowercase) and click "Cast" to cast a spell, or press "N" while holding the wand to open a GUI where there a bunch of spells in buttons. More will be added, so don't worry if you only see a few buttons.

**Note: I do know that some of the spells are at least a little bit off, but I will not update this mod.**

All the spells are in a spell book that you can craft with 1 book and 1 diamond. Right-click the book to see all the spells.

Here are the spells:

- Expecto Patronum- Kills the ender dragon, wither, and warden if they are in a distance of 50 blocks.
- Lumos- Gives you night vision for 200 seconds.
- Nox- Removes night vision.
- Expelliarmus- Deletes the item any entity in a 9-block radius is holding.
- Arania Exumai- Kills any kind of spider in a 10-block radius.
- Confringo- Explodes and makes you invincible for 4 seconds.
- Accio- Brings any item in a 9-block radius to you.
- Avadakedavra- Kills any entity in a 5-block radius with lots of green particles.
- Crucio- Damages any entity in a 3-block radius 30 times. (120 times in 2.2.0+)
- Wingardium Leviosa- Gives any entity in a 6-block radius levitation for 10 seconds.
- Arresto Momentum- Gives any entity in a 3-block radius slowness and slow falling for 10 seconds.
- Petrificus Totalus- Gives any entity in a 5-block radius slowness 10 for 60 seconds. (2.2.0+)

**2.1.0:**
Adds Lumos, Nox, Expelliarmus, Arania Exumai, Confringo, and Accio to the button GUI.

**2.2.0:**

- Adds the spell Petrificus Totalus, which gives any entity in a 5-block radius slowness 10 for 60 seconds.
- Adds the rest of the spells to the button GUI.
- Makes Crucio damage the entiy 120 times instead of 30.
